2604.24086.title: AsyncShield: A Plug-and-Play Edge Adapter for Asynchronous Cloud-based VLA Navigation
2604.24086.paper_summary: While Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have been demonstrated possessing strong zero-shot generalization for robot control, their massive parameter sizes typically necessitate cloud-based deployment. However, cloud deployment introduces network jitter and inference latency, which can induce severe spatiotemporal misalignment in mobile navigation under continuous displacement, so that the stale intents expressed in past ego frames may become spatially incorrect in the current frame and lead to collisions. To address this issue, we propose AsyncShield, a plug-and-play asynchronous control framework. AsyncShield discards traditional black-box time-series prediction in favor of a deterministic physical white-box spatial mapping. By maintaining a temporal pose buffer and utilizing kinematic transformations, the system accurately converts temporal lag into spatial pose offsets to restore the VLA's original geometric intent. To balance intent restoration fidelity and physical safety, the edge adaptation is formulated as a constrained Markov decision process (CMDP). Solved via the PPO-Lagrangian algorithm, a reinforcement learning adapter dynamically trades off between tracking the VLA intent and responding to high-frequency LiDAR obstacle avoidance hard constraints. Furthermore, benefiting from a standardized universal sub-goal interface, domain randomization, and perception-level adaptation via Collision Radius Inflation, AsyncShield operates as a lightweight, plug-and-play module. Simulation and real-world experiments demonstrate that, without fine-tuning any cloud-based foundation models, the framework exhibits zero-shot and robust generalization capabilities, effectively improving the success rate and physical safety of asynchronous navigation.
2604.24086.paper_summary_zh: 雖然視覺-語言-行動（VLA）模型已被證明在機器人控制方面具有強大的零樣本泛化能力，但它們龐大的參數量通常需要基於雲端的部署。<lb/>然而，雲端部署引入了網絡抖動和推理延遲，這可能在持續位移下引起嚴重的時空錯位，使得在過去自我幀中表達的過時意圖在當前幀中可能變得空間不正確，並導致碰撞。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了AsyncShield，一個即插即用的非同步控制框架。<lb/>AsyncShield摒棄了傳統的黑箱時間序列預測，轉而採用確定性的物理白箱空間映射。<lb/>通過維護一個時間姿態緩衝區並利用運動學變換，系統準確地將時間延遲轉換為空間姿態偏移，以恢復VLA的原始幾何意圖。<lb/>為了平衡意圖恢復的真實性和物理安全性，邊緣適應被公式化為一個約束馬爾可夫決策過程（CMDP）。<lb/>通過PPO-Lagrangian算法解決，增強學習適配器動態地在跟蹤VLA意圖和響應高頻LiDAR障礙物避免硬約束之間進行權衡。<lb/>此外，得益於標準化的通用子目標接口、領域隨機化以及通過碰撞半徑膨脹的感知級適應，AsyncShield作為一個輕量級的即插即用模塊運行。<lb/>模擬和實驗室實驗表明，在不微調任何基於雲的基礎模型的情況下，該框架展示了零樣本和穩健的泛化能力，有效提高了非同步導航的成功率和物理安全性。
2604.24086.author: Kai Yang et.al.
2604.24086.authors: Kai Yang, Zedong Chu, Yingnan Guo, Zhengbo Wang, Shichao Xie, Yanfen Shen, Xiaolong Wu, Xing Li, Mu Xu
